name: Proto-Bantu (family node)
notes: STRUCTURAL ANCESTRY NODE (not a modelled G2P target). Proto-Bantu is the reconstructed ancestor of the Bantu branch of Niger-Congo (Swahili, Zulu and c. 500 other languages). It exists here only so the ancestry / phylogenetic-distance metrics of the modern varieties that reference it have a node to resolve to; NO phonology is claimed or reconstructed and the minimal grapheme set is a placeholder (afa.json / trk.json stub pattern).

sources.author: Nurse, D. & Philippson, G. (eds.)
sources.title: The Bantu Languages
sources.notes: Reference for Bantu reconstruction (structural node only).
